bullets: Designed and maintained Excel-based data models and dashboards to analyse sales performance, inventory turnover, and demand patterns.
Automated stock and sales tracking workflows using Excel formulas and structured datasets, reducing manual processing time and improving reporting accuracy.
Analysed historical sales and inventory data to identify inefficiencies and optimise replenishment decisions, contributing to improved stock availability.
Leveraged social media and campaign performance data to evaluate marketing effectiveness and inform targeting strategies.

projects.name: Data Visualization of Australia's Weather
bullets: Built a lightweight ETL pipeline to extract public climate and GIS datasets, clean and transform data using R, and load curated datasets for analysis.
Built interactive analytical dashboards using Vega-Lite and Vega, combining geospatial and time-series visualisations.
Enabled exploratory data analysis through cross-filtering, parameter controls, and interactive tooltips to surface insights.
Analysed environmental trends including bushfire hotspots and koala habitat distribution using high-resolution spatial data.
projects.copyPaste: my Australia Weather Visualization dashboard where I processed GIS and climate datasets, built interactive analytical dashboards using Vega-Lite, and analyzed environmental trends including bushfire hotspots using high-resolution spatial data

projects.name: MonEquip Data Warehousing
bullets: Designed an end-to-end data warehouse using a star schema with fact and dimension tables.
Cleaned and validated data through ETL processes, resolving duplicates, pricing errors, and date anomalies.
Implemented SCD Type 2 and temporal modelling to preserve historical pricing and attribute changes.
Performed advanced SQL analytics using ROLLUP, CUBE, and window functions to analyse revenue and seasonality.
Built a Power BI dashboard and analytical poster to communicate insights.
projects.copyPaste: my MonEquip Data Warehousing project, where I designed star-schema data warehouses, performed advanced SQL analytics using ROLLUP, CUBE, and window functions, and built comprehensive Power BI dashboards to communicate insights

bullets: Built an interactive NBA analytics dashboard using Flask, R, MongoDB, and JavaScript.
Designed a statistical ranking model using z-score normalization, PCA, and weighted metrics.
Automated R-based ETL pipelines to ingest and process live NBA data.
Deployed the application using Docker, Git, and Agile practices.

Implemented Twitter/X sentiment analysis using Tweepy and TextBlob NLP to gauge market mood per coin.
Developed ML-based price predictions using scikit-learn linear regression on 24-hour historical data.
Created a fantasy league system with virtual $10,000 starting funds and P&L tracking.

projects.name: Otsuka - Personal AI Agent (OpenClaw)
bullets: Built and deployed a 24/7 personal AI agent on AWS EC2 using OpenClaw framework with Claude Sonnet 4.6.
